subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! O ye favoured ones at the Threshold of the One Who transcendeth all limitations! That distinguished martyr, like unto a lucky star
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی ای مقبولان درگاه حضرت غیرمتناهی حضرت شهید چون نور سعید از مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
